mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT d.device_id) AS totalDeviceCount,
COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.status != 'OFFLINE' THEN d.device_id END) AS operatingDeviceCount,
COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.status = 'OFFLINE' THEN d.device_id END) AS offlineDeviceCount,
COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN el.log_id IS NOT NULL THEN d.device_id END) AS loggedDeviceCount,
IFNULL(SUM(el.daily_kwh), 0) AS monthlyGenerationKwh,
IFNULL(SUM(el.cost), 0) AS monthlySavedCost,
IFNULL(AVG(el.efficiency), 0) AS averageEfficiency
FROM ess_device d
LEFT JOIN energy_log el ON d.device_id = el.device_id AND DATE_FORMAT(el.log_date, '%Y-%m') = #{selectedMonth}
WHERE d.member_id = #{memberId} AND IFNULL(d.deleted_yn, 'N') = 'N'
AND d.group_id = #{groupId}
AND d.device_id = #{deviceId}

SELECT d.device_id, d.device_name, d.group_id, d.status, d.is_main, g.group_name
FROM ess_device d
LEFT JOIN ess_device_group g ON d.group_id = g.group_id
WHERE d.member_id = #{memberId} AND IFNULL(d.deleted_yn, 'N') = 'N'
AND d.group_id = #{groupId}
AND d.device_id = #{deviceId}
ORDER BY d.device_id ASC

SELECT group_id, group_name
FROM ess_device_group
WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
ORDER BY group_id ASC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(el.log_date, '%Y-%m') AS label,
IFNULL(SUM(el.daily_kwh), 0) AS monthlyKwh,
IFNULL(SUM(el.daily_kwh), 0) AS value
FROM energy_log el
JOIN ess_device d ON el.device_id = d.device_id
WHERE d.member_id = #{memberId} AND IFNULL(d.deleted_yn, 'N') = 'N'
AND el.log_date >= DATE_FORMAT( DATE_SUB( STR_TO_DATE( CONCAT(#{selectedMonth}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d' ), INTERVAL 5 MONTH ), '%Y-%m-01' )
AND el.log_date <= LAST_DAY( STR_TO_DATE( CONCAT(#{selectedMonth}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d' ) )
AND d.group_id = #{groupId}
AND d.device_id = #{deviceId}
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(el.log_date, '%Y-%m')
ORDER BY label ASC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(el.log_date, '%Y-%m') AS label,
IFNULL(SUM(el.cost), 0) AS savedCost,
IFNULL(SUM(el.cost), 0) AS value
FROM energy_log el
JOIN ess_device d ON el.device_id = d.device_id
WHERE d.member_id = #{memberId} AND IFNULL(d.deleted_yn, 'N') = 'N'
AND el.log_date >= DATE_FORMAT( DATE_SUB( STR_TO_DATE( CONCAT(#{selectedMonth}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d' ), INTERVAL 5 MONTH ), '%Y-%m-01' )
AND el.log_date <= LAST_DAY( STR_TO_DATE( CONCAT(#{selectedMonth}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d' ) )
AND d.group_id = #{groupId}
AND d.device_id = #{deviceId}
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(el.log_date, '%Y-%m')
ORDER BY label ASC

SELECT d.device_name AS label,
d.device_name AS deviceName,
IFNULL(g.group_name, '미지정') AS groupName,
IFNULL(SUM(el.daily_kwh), 0) AS monthlyKwh,
IFNULL(SUM(el.daily_kwh), 0) AS value
FROM ess_device d
LEFT JOIN ess_device_group g ON d.group_id = g.group_id
LEFT JOIN energy_log el ON d.device_id = el.device_id AND DATE_FORMAT(el.log_date, '%Y-%m') = #{selectedMonth}
WHERE d.member_id = #{memberId} AND IFNULL(d.deleted_yn, 'N') = 'N'
AND d.group_id = #{groupId}
AND d.device_id = #{deviceId}
GROUP BY d.device_id, d.device_name, g.group_name
ORDER BY monthlyKwh DESC
LIMIT 5
